# PixlCam
 
> PixlCam is a free dashcam app developed by CM Interactive Limited that turns your smartphone into a dashcam. No extra hardware required - just install the app, mount your phone, and drive protected. Available on Android, coming soon to iPhone.
 
## Pages
 
- [Home](https://pixlcam.com/): Main landing page. Explains what PixlCam is, how it works, and links to download on Android.
- [Get Started](https://pixlcam.com/get-started): Step-by-step onboarding guide. Covers mounting your phone, installing the app, and starting to record.
- [iPhone Waitlist](https://pixlcam.com/iphone-waitlist): PixlCam is coming to iOS. Users can join the waitlist to be notified when PixlCam launches on the Apple App Store.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pixlcam.com/privacy-policy): Full privacy policy covering app data handling, crash diagnostics, newsletter data, and third-party services (Firebase Crashlytics, Brevo).
 
## Product
 
- PixlCam is free to install and use
- Records video in the background while driving
- Loop recording automatically overwrites old footage to prevent storage from filling up
- Users can protect important clips to prevent them being overwritten
- No account required
- Available on Android via Google Play
- iOS version in active development
 
## Company
 
- Developer: CM Interactive Limited
- Registered in England and Wales, Company No. 15392983
- Contact: support@pixlcam.com
- Website: https://pixlcam.com
